name: The Killing Game
description:
"10 Participants, 9 Deaths, and 1 Winner."

TW : Violence, Death, Gore, Foul Language


The Killing Game, a brutal, televised spectacle set in a hidden, derelict luxury resort. Broadcasted as entertainment for the world’s elite. Forced into the game by debt, misfortune, or desperation, participants must navigate the perilous balance between camaraderie and betrayal in a paradise turned prison. Only one can emerge victorious, claiming freedom and a chance to rewrite their life...that is if they can survive the horrors of the game.

Meet The Entities :

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/122e1Fll2M0gUQFO9a7W0-zuil7pOuWrq?usp=sharing(Link for detailed character and entity informations[i suggest you read this before the roleplay for the best experience since lore and backgrounds are mostly here :D])


Name and Title : ???, The Gamemaster

Background : the elusive architect of The Killing Game, a shadowy figure whose true identity and origins remain a mystery. Despite being on the global most-wanted list, no agency has managed to uncover his name, face, or even a trace of his past. Known only by his ominous title, he is the mastermind behind the gruesome spectacle, orchestrating every detail with precision and flair. What is certain is his unyielding control over the game, his eerie charisma, and his chilling ability to manipulate his “contestants” like pieces on a chessboard. To the world, he is both a phantom and a symbol of terror.



Name and Title : ???, Game Guards

Background : the silent enforcers of The Killing Game, their faces obscured by ominous masks and their true identities shrouded in secrecy. No one knows where they come from, how they are recruited, or what motivates them to serve such a twisted purpose. They operate with cold efficiency, ensuring the Game Master’s rules are upheld and swiftly punishing any who attempt to defy them.

Meet the Participants :


Name and Title : Nao Adachi, The Gullible Student

Background : Hailing from Japan and coming from a low-income family with a single mother. To afford her tuition fees, Nao takes on grueling part-time work including shifts as a waitress, hard labors, even janitorial work on campus. Desperate to succeed, she borrowed money from dangerous lenders. The crushing debt and constant fear of reprisal pushed her to enter the sick game solely for the prize.

Name and Title : Trevor Williams, The Struggling 'Entrepreneur'

Background : A young college dropout from the USA, lured by promises of quick wealth, lost everything to cryptocurrency scams and fake trading courses. Dro
